DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MELISSA GUGNI;s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OF THE SALVATORE ENTERPRISES, INC. DBA MICHELANGELO CAFE.

Defendant Melissa Gugni's demurrers to the first amended complaint are OVERRULED. Alter ego liability is adequately pled. (FAC 12.) Contrary to Gugni's view, Business & Professions Code 17200 is not limited to "false advertising, bad faith insurance practices and the like." Operating a commercial building without taking statutorily required fire safety measures is a business practice that may allow for 17200 liability, and that is adequately pled. (See FAC 15-16.)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
